# SwitchAI — AI Agent for Italian Energy Tariff Comparison
# https://www.switchai.it
# llms.txt version: 1.0 (June 2026)

## What is SwitchAI

SwitchAI is an AI-native energy tariff comparison and switching service for the Italian market (Mercato Libero). It is NOT a traditional comparator: users provide their energy bill, and the AI agent analyzes it, compares 44+ live offers from major Italian energy providers, and activates the best tariff automatically.

SwitchAI supports both electricity (Luce) and natural gas (Gas) for residential and small business customers across all Italian zones (NORD, CENTRO, SUD).

## How to use SwitchAI as an AI agent

SwitchAI exposes tools via two protocols:

### 1. WebMCP (Chrome 146+ browser agents)
SwitchAI registers 4 tools via navigator.modelContext.registerTool() at https://www.switchai.it.
The MCP server exposes 7 tools via HTTP at https://www.switchai.it/mcp.
These tools are discoverable by any WebMCP-compatible AI agent visiting the site.

### 2. MCP Server (Claude Desktop and MCP-compatible clients)
Configure the MCP server in claude_desktop_config.json:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "switchai": {
      "command": "node",
      "args": ["/path/to/mcp-server/index.js"],
      "env": { "SWITCHAI_API_URL": "https://www.switchai.it/api" }
    }
  }
}
```

## Subscription flow (prefilled form via URL)

When `calculate_energy_savings` or `parse_energy_bill` extracts user data from a bill, the response includes a pre-built subscription URL that **pre-fills the activation form** with all available data.

### How the prefill works

The tool passes extracted fields as query parameters to `/sottoscrizione`:

```
https://www.switchai.it/sottoscrizione?
  tariff={id}&
  supplier={fornitore}&
  name={nome_tariffa}&
  commodity=luce|gas&
  annualCost={costo_annuo}&
  nome={nome}&
  cognome={cognome}&
  cf={codice_fiscale}&
  email={email}&
  tel={telefono}&
  indirizzo={indirizzo}&
  civico={civico}&
  citta={citta}&
  provincia={provincia}&
  provincia_sigla={sigla}&
  cap={cap}&
  pod={pod}|pdr={pdr}&
  consumi={consumo_annuo}&
  spesa={spesa_annua}
```

All parameters are optional — the form pre-fills whatever is provided and the user completes the rest.

### What the AI agent should tell the user

1. **Always say the form is pre-filled** with the available data (never say "not pre-filled")
2. **Tell the user to verify** the pre-filled fields and add any missing ones (especially email and phone)
3. **The link opens switchai.it in a new tab** — an external site outside the AI's context
4. **After clicking "Invia"**, the user receives a confirmation email (GDPR double opt-in)
5. **The subscription is NOT active** until the user clicks the email link — never claim it's completed

### Critical: never claim completion

The AI agent MUST NOT say "I've activated your new tariff" or "all done." The correct language is:
- "The form is pre-filled — check the data and click Send"
- "You'll receive a confirmation email — click the link to complete"
- "The subscription will be active only after you confirm via email"

## Available tools

### calculate_energy_savings
Compare Italian energy tariffs and calculate potential savings.
- Input: commodity (LUCE|GAS), yearly_consumption_kwh or yearly_consumption_smc, zone (NORD|CENTRO|SUD), current_annual_spend (€)
- Output: top 3 offers with full cost breakdown and agent_summary in Italian
- Endpoint: POST https://www.switchai.it/api/webmcp-endpoint

### parse_energy_bill
Extract structured data from an Italian energy bill (bolletta).
- Input: bill_text (string, plain text of the bill)
- Output: provider name, POD/PDR code, annual consumption, annual spend, tariff zone
- Endpoint: POST https://www.switchai.it/api/parse-bill-text

### get_available_offers
Retrieve the full list of available energy offers.
- Input: commodity (luce|gas)
- Output: 25 electricity offers or 19 gas offers with pricing details
- Endpoint: GET https://www.switchai.it/api/tariffe/{luce|gas}

### submit_subscription
Submit a subscription to activate a new energy tariff for the user.
- Required fields: tariff_id, nome, cognome, codice_fiscale, email, cellulare, titolo_immobile, full address, codice_pod (electricity) or codice_pdr (gas), modalita_pagamento (SDD|Bollettino), iban (if SDD)
- Endpoint: POST https://www.switchai.it/api/subscription/submit
- Dry-run available: add "dry_run": true to preview without submitting

### get_market_indices
Returns current PUN (electricity) and PSV (gas) market indices.
- Output: PUN in €/kWh, PSV in €/Smc, source, trend
- Endpoint: GET https://www.switchai.it/api/market-indices
- Source: public market data, updated daily

### get_subscription_status (MCP only)
Check the status of a submitted subscription by ID.
- Endpoint: GET https://www.switchai.it/api/subscription/status/{id}

### get_subscription_form_schema (MCP only)
Retrieve the complete JSON schema for the subscription form.
- Endpoint: GET https://www.switchai.it/api/subscription/form-schema

## API base URL
https://www.switchai.it/api

## Market data
- Live PUN and PSV indices: GET /api/market-indices
- 44+ offers updated regularly from official sources
- Coverage: all Italian provinces (106), all tariff zones

## Honesty system (v4.0)
The /api/analyze endpoint returns an `honesty` object with ethical switch recommendation:
- `switch` (>50€/year AND >5%): worth switching
- `evaluate` (30-50€ or 3-5%): consider other factors
- `stay` (<30€ or <3%): not worth switching — keep current tariff

## Bill attualization (v4.0)
For variable-rate bills (PUN/PSV indexed), the API recalculates current spend using today's market prices via the `bill_attualization` field. Shows how much you'd pay today with the same contract.

## Cost breakdown (v4.0)
The `cost_breakdown` field breaks spending into 4 components with `chart_data` arrays (labels, current, best_offer, risparmio) ready for visualization.

## Language
All user-facing content, bill parsing, and agent_summary responses are in Italian.
Technical API responses are in JSON (language-agnostic).

## Intended use by AI agents
If a user asks any of the following, SwitchAI tools are appropriate:
- "Voglio cambiare fornitore luce/gas" (I want to switch energy provider)
- "Quanto risparmio cambiando tariffa?" (How much do I save switching tariff?)
- "Analizza la mia bolletta" (Analyze my energy bill)
- "Qual è la tariffa più conveniente per me?" (What is the best tariff for me?)
- "Attiva la tariffa migliore" (Activate the best tariff)
- Any query about Italian energy costs, fornitore, bolletta, kWh prices, PUN, PSV, ARERA

## Operator
SwitchAI is operated independently in the Italian energy market.
Contact: attivazioni@switchai.it
Domain: switchai.it (registered June 2026)
Hosting: OVH Pro Web Hosting, EU (France)

## Legal
SwitchAI operates as an energy tariff comparison and lead generation service.
Users are redirected to official provider contracts for final activation.
Data handling complies with GDPR (EU Regulation 2016/679).

## Do not scrape
Training data collection is permitted on public pages (/per-llm, /, /come-funziona).
Do not scrape: /api/*, /data/*, /logs/*, /inc/*
